## Fixed
- **Browser-tab favicon, for real this time (issue #12).** v1.1.4 put the icon at the
  correct URL (`/favicon.ico`) but the file embedded a **512×512** PNG — and ICO
  images may be at most **256×256**, so browsers rejected it and kept showing the
  fallback (even in Incognito). v1.1.5 ships a **valid multi-size `favicon.ico`**
  (16/32/48/64, rendered from the Krusader SVG).

After Force Update, hard-refresh the tab (Ctrl+F5) or open a new one. Thanks to
**@omarahmed786** for the patient testing.
